scene: Teen Byte sits at desk late Sunday night, gazing toward the Chicago skyline window with calm ecstatic energy, laptop glowing softly beside them

subjects.description: Byte, a rounded blue teen-stage pixel art blob with gangly limbs, big expressive eyes, slight smile, sitting upright at desk with head turned toward the window
subjects.action: gazing at the Chicago night skyline with quiet wonder, one arm resting on the desk

subjects.description: wooden desk with oversized silver laptop open, Chicago skyline window behind-left showing dark sky with glowing city lights, trophy shelf above with one golden trophy on the left and one small green plant on the right

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette
lighting: late night interior, deep blue-black sky outside window with twinkling city building lights, warm laptop screen glow illuminating desk and Byte from the front, dim ambient room light
mood: calm ecstatic wonder, peaceful anticipation, late-night quiet energy
background: trophy shelf above desk with exactly one golden 10-day trophy on the left and exactly one leafy green plant on the right with clear spacing between them, food bowl on floor to the right of the desk with moderate kibble, Chicago night skyline visible through window
composition: Byte centered at desk, head and body slightly angled toward the window, oversized laptop open on desk, trophy shelf clearly visible above, skyline window in background
